title: dactylorhiza × predaensis
intro: Dactylorhiza × predaensis, also known as the Praelongera orchid, is a natural hybrid species between Dactylorhiza incarnata and Dactylorhiza sambucina, belonging to the orchid family. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × predaensis include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing irritated mucous membranes. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken orally, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
